title: SmartApeSG campaign pushes Remcos RAT, NetSupport RAT, StealC, and Sectop RAT (A

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - SmartApeSG campaign pushes Remcos RAT, NetSupport RAT, Steal
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/27
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*361118191.pdf*'
            - '*drag2pdf.zip*'
            - '*finalmesh.zip*'
            - '*isc.sans.edu*'
            - '*malware-traffic-analysis.net*'
            - '*post.hta*'
    condition: selection_ip
level: high
rules.yara:
rule CDB_APEX_SmartApeSG_campaign_pushes_Remcos_RAT__N {
    meta:
        description = "SmartApeSG campaign pushes Remcos RAT, NetSupport RAT, Steal"
        author = "CyberDudeBivash"
    strings:
        $h0 = "212d8007a7ce374d38949cf54d80133bd69338131670282008940f1995d7a720" ascii nocase
        $h1 = "6e26ff49387088178319e116700b123d27216d98ba3ae1ce492544cb9acd38f0" ascii nocase
        $h2 = "a6a748c0606fb9600fdf04763523b7da20b382b054b875fdd1ef1c36fc16079a" ascii nocase
        $h3 = "a7b9be1211c6de76bab31dbcd3a1c99861cf18e3230ea9f634e07d22c179d1ca" ascii nocase
        $h4 = "c90435370728d48cba1c00d92cc3bf99e85f01aa52ecd6c6df2e8137db964796" ascii nocase
    condition:

}
